name: Sarvajal Water ATM
description: Water ATMs are automated water dispensing units.

taxonomy.sub_category: Sarvajal Water ATM Updated on January 3, 2024 · Created on August 6, 2016 Sarvajal Water ATM Water ATMs are automated water dispensing units. Developed By Piramal Water Pvt Ltd. Tested By Sarvajal Water ATM Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Water ATMs are automated water dispensing units. The system is solar-powered and connected to the cloud to facilitate remote monitoring of water usage and quality. Installation requires a room with a concrete wall for the Water ATM and a stable roof for water tank storage. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations Piramal Sarvajal has implementing partners such as Adani, L&T Constructions, and DLF Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include JanaJal Safe Water ATM and Water Dispensation Unit (WDU) . Countries India Manufacturing/Building Method Manufactured by Piramal Water Private Limited in Gujarat, India. Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Piramal Sarvajal uses their Adopt a Village/school/slum/public place program to distribute their products using local entrepreneurs. Sarvajal leases its water purification technology/equipment to a local entrepreneur who becomes the franchise owner. Distributions to Date Status 627 ATMs as of August 2020 Description of system Water ATM Integrated treatment (yes/no) Yes, 5 step purification System flow rate (L/min) Unknown Maximum number of customers served 500,000 people Compatible water sources Municipal or groundwater Design Specifications Water ATM has dimensions (w/d/h) 1.5 x 1.4 x 2.5 ft and weighs 15-20 kg. It is an automated water dispensing unit with 24 x 7 access. It is solar powered, cloud connected, has RFID card based transaction system, provides remote/online tracking of each transaction. The user has to pay-per-use from the smart card. The water undergoes reverse osmosis and UV treatment. Product Schematics Technical Support Maintenance includes a monthly scheduled maintenance, emergency maintenance, and a toll free service number: 18001032334 Replacement Components Available from manufacturer Lifecycle Unknown Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The manufacturers claim transparency in price and quality of the water. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety Safety required in handling the smart card technology Complementary Technical Systems None Academic Research and References “Piramal Sarvajal,” Piramal Sarvajal.
